creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
NB https://bugs.erlang.org/projects/ERL/issues/ERL-958 should have resolved this upstream now. As this is  now 2 years old, please let us know if you can re-test on arm6 or arm7 so we can pull in your patch, against e.g. lang/erlang or erlang-runtime21 still.

I appreciate that a BBB is not a particularly fast compile target...
